quotes.en: The unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.zh: 未经审视的人生是不值得过的。

quotes.en: No man ever steps in the same river twice, for it's not the same river and he's not the same man.
quotes.zh: 人不能两次踏进同一条河流，因为河流已非旧流，人亦非旧人。

quotes.en: We can easily forgive a child who is afraid of the dark; the real tragedy of life is when men are afraid of the light.
quotes.zh: 我们可以轻易原谅一个怕黑的孩子；生命中真正的悲剧，是成人们害怕光明。

quotes.en: The whole is greater than the sum of its parts.
quotes.zh: 整体大于部分之和。

quotes.en: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.zh: 我们的重复行为造就了我们。因此，卓越不是一种行为，而是一种习惯。

quotes.en: It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
quotes.zh: 重要的不是发生在你身上的事，而是你如何应对它。

quotes.en: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
quotes.zh: 你拥有控制自己思想的力量，而非外部事件。意识到这一点，你就会找到力量。

quotes.en: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
quotes.zh: 运气，就是当准备遇上机会。

quotes.en: Give me a place to stand, and a lever long enough, and I will move the world.
quotes.zh: 给我一个支点和一根足够长的杠杆，我就能撬动地球。

quotes.en: Number is the ruler of forms and ideas, and the cause of gods and demons.
quotes.zh: 数字是形式与理念的统治者，也是神魔的起因。

quotes.en: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
quotes.zh: 千里之行，始于足下。

quotes.en: The softest things in the world overcome the hardest things in the world.
quotes.zh: 天下之至柔，驰骋天下之至坚。

quotes.en: Knowing others is intelligence; knowing yourself is true wisdom.
quotes.zh: 知人者智，自知者明。

quotes.en: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance.
quotes.zh: 知之为知之，不知为不知，是知也。

quotes.en: Study the past if you would define the future.
quotes.zh: 温故而知新，可以为师矣。

quotes.en: If you know the enemy and know yourself, you need not fear the result of a hundred battles.
quotes.zh: 知己知彼，百战不殆。

quotes.en: The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting.
quotes.zh: 不战而屈人之兵，善之善者也。

quotes.en: A frog in a well cannot discuss the ocean, because he is limited by the size of his well.
quotes.zh: 井蛙不可以语于海者，拘于虚也。

quotes.en: No country is permanently strong. Nor is any country permanently weak.
quotes.zh: 国无常强，无常弱。

quotes.en: He who exerts his mind to the utmost knows his nature.
quotes.zh: 尽其心者，知其性也。

quotes.en: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
quotes.zh: 思想决定一切。你所想，即你所成。

quotes.en: From one thing, know ten thousand things.
quotes.zh: 识一物，懂万物。

quotes.en: Do nothing which is of no use.
quotes.zh: 勿做无用之事。

quotes.en: Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
quotes.zh: 昨日我足够聪明，所以我想改变世界；今日我已然智慧，所以我正在改变自己。

quotes.en: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
quotes.zh: 伤口，是光照进你内心的地方。

quotes.en: The past resembles the future more than one drop of water resembles another.
quotes.zh: 过去与未来的相似度，远胜过两滴水之间的相似度。

quotes.en: He who finds a new path is a pathfinder, even if the trail has to be found again by others.
quotes.zh: 找到新路的人便是开拓者，哪怕这条路后来还要被别人再找一遍。

quotes.en: Be happy for this moment. This moment is your life.
quotes.zh: 为此刻感到快乐吧，此刻即是你的全部人生。

quotes.en: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.zh: 极简是终极的复杂。

quotes.en: Learning never exhausts the mind.
quotes.zh: 学习永远不会让大脑枯竭。

quotes.en: It is much safer to be feared than loved because ... love is preserved by the link of obligation which, owing to the baseness of men, is broken at every opportunity for their advantage; but fear preserves you by a dread of punishment which never fails.
quotes.zh: 被人畏惧比受人爱戴安全得多……因为爱是由义务的纽带维系的，由于人性的卑劣，一旦涉及私利，这纽带随时会断裂；但畏惧则由对惩罚的恐惧来维系，这种恐惧永远不会失效。

quotes.en: A prince must be a fox to recognize traps, and a lion to frighten wolves.
quotes.zh: 君主必须是一只懂得识别陷阱的狐狸，也是一头能震慑豺狼的狮子。

quotes.en: Knowledge itself is power.
quotes.zh: 知识本身就是力量。

quotes.en: If a man will begin with certainties, he shall end in doubts; but if he will be content to begin with doubts, he shall end in certainties.
quotes.zh: 如果一个人以确信开始，他必将以怀疑告终；但如果他愿意以怀疑开始，他必将以确信告终。

quotes.en: I think, therefore I am.
quotes.zh: 我思故我在。

quotes.en: Divide each difficulty into as many parts as is feasible and necessary to resolve it.
quotes.zh: 将每一个难题划分为尽可能多、且为解决所必需的部分。

quotes.en: You cannot teach a man anything; you can only help him find it within himself.
quotes.zh: 你无法教会一个人任何东西，你只能帮助他从内心找到它。

quotes.en: Mathematics is the language in which God has written the universe.
quotes.zh: 数学是上帝书写宇宙的语言。

quotes.en: If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of Giants.
quotes.zh: 如果说我看得比别人更远些，那是因为我站在巨人的肩膀上。

quotes.en: To every action there is always opposed an equal reaction.
quotes.zh: 每一个作用力都对应着一个大小相等、方向相反的反作用力。

quotes.en: Nature uses as little as possible of anything.
quotes.zh: 自然界做任何事都会把损耗降到最低。

quotes.en: The condition of man... is a condition of war of everyone against everyone.
quotes.zh: 人类的自然状态，就是所有人对所有人的战争。

quotes.en: No man's knowledge here can go beyond his experience.
quotes.zh: 没有任何人的知识能够超越他的经验。

quotes.en: All of humanity's problems stem from man's inability to sit quietly in a room alone.
quotes.zh: 人类所有的烦恼，都源于无法独自安静地在一个房间里坐着。

quotes.en: The heart has its reasons of which reason knows nothing.
quotes.zh: 心有其理，而理智对此一无所知。

quotes.en: I have striven not to laugh at human actions, not to weep at them, nor to hate them, but to understand them.
quotes.zh: 我一直努力不嘲笑人类的行为，不为之哭泣，不憎恨它，而是去理解它。

quotes.en: Judge a man by his questions rather than by his answers.
quotes.zh: 通过一个人的问题而不是他的答案来评判他。

quotes.en: Doubt is an uncomfortable condition, but certainty is a ridiculous one.
quotes.zh: 怀疑是一种令人不适的状态，但确信是一种荒谬的状态。

quotes.en: To become truly great, one has to stand with people, not above them.
quotes.zh: 想要真正伟大，一个人必须与人民站在一起，而不是凌驾于他们之上。

quotes.en: Man is born free, and everywhere he is in chains.
quotes.zh: 人生而自由，却无往不在枷锁之中。

quotes.en: A wise man proportions his belief to the evidence.
quotes.zh: 智者根据证据的多少来调整自己的信念。

quotes.en: It is not from the benevolence of the butcher, the brewer, or the baker that we expect our dinner, but from their regard to their own self-interest.
quotes.zh: 我们期待的晚餐并非来自屠夫、酿酒师或面包师的恩惠，而是来自他们对自身利益的关切。

quotes.en: To know that we know what we know, and to know that we do not know what we do not know, that is true knowledge.
quotes.zh: 知道我们知道什么，并知道我们不知道什么，这才是真正的知识。

quotes.en: Act only according to that maxim whereby you can, at the same time, will that it should become a universal law.
quotes.zh: 你的行动，应当仅仅遵循那些你同时愿意它成为普遍法则的准则。

quotes.en: Dare to know! Have courage to use your own reason!
quotes.zh: 敢于认知！要有勇气使用你自己的理智！

quotes.en: We live in the best of all possible worlds.
quotes.zh: 我们生活在所有可能世界中最好的一个。

quotes.en: Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Willing is not enough; we must do.
quotes.zh: 仅有知识是不够的，我们必须应用；仅有偏好是不够的，我们必须行动。

quotes.en: A man sees in the world what he carries in his heart.
quotes.zh: 一个人在世界中看到的，正是他内心所承载的。

quotes.en: Lost time is never found again.
quotes.zh: 失去的时间永远无法找回。

quotes.en: Beware of little expenses. A small leak will sink a great ship.
quotes.zh: 当心微小的开销。一个小漏洞就能沉没一艘大船。

quotes.en: Those who would give up essential Liberty, to purchase a little temporary Safety, deserve neither Liberty nor Safety.
quotes.zh: 那些为了换取暂时的安全而放弃基本自由的人，既不配得到自由，也不配得到安全。

quotes.en: A national debt, if it is not excessive, will be to us a national blessing.
quotes.zh: 如果国家债务不过分，对我们来说将是一种国家福祉。

quotes.en: Under a system of perfectly free commerce, each country naturally devotes its capital and labour to such employments as are most beneficial to each.
quotes.zh: 在完全自由贸易的体制下，每个国家自然会将其资本和劳动力投入到对彼此最有利的行业中。

quotes.en: The power of population is indefinitely greater than the power in the earth to produce subsistence for man.
quotes.zh: 人口增长的力量，无限大于地球为人类生产生存资料的力量。

quotes.en: There is only one difference between a bad economist and a good one: the bad economist confines himself to the visible effect; the good economist takes into account both the effect that can be seen and those effects that must be foreseen.
quotes.zh: 好经济学家与坏经济学家的区别只有一个：坏的只看可见的后果；好的则同时考虑可见的后果和那些必须预见的后果。

quotes.en: It is not the consciousness of men that determines their being, but, on the contrary, their social being that determines their consciousness.
quotes.zh: 不是人们的意识决定人们的存在，相反，是人们的社会存在决定人们的意识。

quotes.en: Capital is dead labour, that, vampire-like, only lives by sucking living labour, and lives the more, the more labour it sucks.
quotes.zh: 资本是死劳动，它像吸血鬼一样，只有吸吮活劳动才有生命，吸吮的活劳动越多，它的生命力就越旺盛。

quotes.en: He who knows only his own side of the case knows little of that.
quotes.zh: 只了解自己一方观点的人，其实对此知之甚少。

quotes.en: Actions are right in proportion as they tend to promote happiness, wrong as they tend to produce the reverse of happiness.
quotes.zh: 行为的正确性与它们促进幸福的倾向成正比，与其产生不幸的倾向成反比。

quotes.en: I know of no country in which there is so little independence of mind and real freedom of discussion as in America.
quotes.zh: 我不知道还有哪个国家像美国那样，思想独立和真正的讨论自由如此匮乏。

quotes.en: Survival of the fittest.
quotes.zh: 适者生存。

quotes.en: Cause and effect, means and ends, seed and fruit, cannot be severed; for the effect already blooms in the cause, the end preexists in the means, the fruit in the seed.
quotes.zh: 因与果、手段与目的、种子与果实是无法分割的；因为果已在因中绽放，目的已存在于手段中，果实已孕育在种子内。

quotes.en: It is not the strongest of the species that survives, nor the most intelligent that survives. It is the one that is most adaptable to change.
quotes.zh: 存活下来的物种，不是那些最强壮的，也不是那些最聪明的，而是那些对变化最能适应的。

quotes.en: I had, also, during many years, followed a golden rule, namely, that whenever a published fact, a new observation or thought came across me, which was opposed to my general results, to make a memorandum of it without fail and at once.
quotes.zh: 多年来我一直遵循一条金科玉律：每当遇到与我的普遍结论相左的事实、新观察或新想法时，必须立刻且毫无例外地将其记录下来。

quotes.en: Nothing is too wonderful to be true, if it be consistent with the laws of nature.
quotes.zh: 只要符合自然法则，没有什么事情会因为太奇妙而显得不真实。

quotes.en: The true logic of this world is in the calculus of probabilities.
quotes.zh: 这个世界的真正逻辑在于概率的计算。
quotes.authorZh: 詹姆斯·克拉克·麦克斯韦

quotes.en: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
quotes.zh: 我没有失败。我只是找到了10,000种行不通的方法。

quotes.en: Vision without execution is hallucination.
quotes.zh: 没有执行力的愿景仅仅是幻觉。

quotes.en: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration.
quotes.zh: 如果你想找到宇宙的秘密，请从能量、频率和振动的角度去思考。

quotes.en: The present is theirs; the future, for which I really worked, is mine.
quotes.zh: 现在是他们的；但我真正为之工作的未来，是我的。

quotes.en: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood. Now is the time to understand more, so that we may fear less.
quotes.zh: 生活中没有什么可怕的，只有需要理解的。现在是时候去理解更多，以便我们恐惧更少。

quotes.en: In the fields of observation chance favors only the prepared mind.
quotes.zh: 在观察的领域里，机遇只偏爱有准备的头脑。

quotes.en: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
quotes.zh: 生活只能向后理解，但必须向前度过。

quotes.en: Anxiety is the dizziness of freedom.
quotes.zh: 焦虑，是自由的眩晕。

quotes.en: Talent hits a target no one else can hit; Genius hits a target no one else can see.
quotes.zh: 人才击中别人击不中的目标；天才击中别人看不见的目标。

quotes.en: Man can do what he wills but he cannot will what he wills.
quotes.zh: 人可以做他想做的，但不能决定他想要什么。

quotes.en: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
quotes.zh: 那些杀不死我们的，会让我们更强大。

quotes.en: And if thou gaze long into an abyss, the abyss will also gaze into thee.
quotes.zh: 当你凝视深渊时，深渊也在凝视你。

quotes.en: He who has a why to live for can bear almost any how.
quotes.zh: 知道“为什么”而活的人，几乎能承受任何“怎么活”的境遇。

quotes.en: Our life is frittered away by detail... simplify, simplify.
quotes.zh: 我们的生命被琐事消耗殆尽……简化，再简化。

quotes.en: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
quotes.zh: 在一个不断试图把你变成其他人的世界里，做你自己就是最大的成就。

quotes.en: Until you make the unconscious conscious, it will direct your life and you will call it fate.
quotes.zh: 除非你让潜意识变得有意识，否则它将主导你的生活，而你会称之为命运。

quotes.en: Everything in war is very simple, but the simplest thing is difficult. The difficulties accumulate and end by producing a kind of friction that is inconceivable unless one has experienced war.
quotes.zh: 战争中一切都很简单，但最简单的事情也是困难的。困难不断累积，最终产生一种除非亲身经历否则无法想象的摩擦力。

quotes.en: The center of gravity is always found where the mass is concentrated most densely.
quotes.zh: 重心总是存在于质量最密集的地方。

quotes.en: Give me six hours to chop down a tree and I will spend the first four sharpening the axe.
quotes.zh: 给我六小时砍一棵树，我会花前四个小时磨斧头。

quotes.en: Politics is the art of the possible, the attainable — the art of the next best.
quotes.zh: 政治是可能性的艺术，是可实现目标的艺术——是退而求其次的艺术。

quotes.en: To understand God's thoughts we must study statistics, for these are the measure of His purpose.
quotes.zh: 要理解上帝的思想，我们必须研究统计学，因为那是衡量他意图的尺度。

quotes.en: Nothing else in the world... is so powerful as an idea whose time has come.
quotes.zh: 世界上没有任何东西……能比一个时机已到的想法更有力量。

quotes.en: All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way.
quotes.zh: 幸福的家庭都是相似的；不幸的家庭各有各的不幸。

quotes.en: It was the best of times, it was the worst of times, it was the age of wisdom, it was the age of foolishness...
quotes.zh: 那是最美好的时代，那是最糟糕的时代；那是智慧的年头，那是愚昧的年头……

quotes.en: It ain't what you don't know that gets you into trouble. It's what you know for sure that just ain't so.
quotes.zh: 让你陷入困境的不是你不知道的事，而是你深信不疑、但其实并非如此的事。

quotes.en: Once you eliminate the impossible, whatever remains, no matter how improbable, must be the truth.
quotes.zh: 排除一切不可能的，剩下的即使再不可思议，那也是真相。

quotes.en: Imagination is more important than knowledge. For knowledge is limited, whereas imagination embraces the entire world.
quotes.zh: 想象力比知识更重要。因为知识是有限的，而想象力概括着世界上的一切。

quotes.en: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it... he who doesn't... pays it.
quotes.zh: 复利是世界第八大奇迹。懂它的人从中获利，不懂它的人为其买单。

quotes.en: Science advances one funeral at a time.
quotes.zh: 科学是一场接一场的葬礼。

quotes.en: The first principle is that you must not fool yourself and you are the easiest person to fool.
quotes.zh: 首要原则是：你绝不能欺骗自己，而你是最容易被自己欺骗的人。

quotes.en: The limits of my language mean the limits of my world.
quotes.zh: 我语言的边界，就是我世界的边界。

quotes.en: What we observe is not nature itself, but nature exposed to our method of questioning.
quotes.zh: 我们所观察到的并不是自然本身，而是自然暴露在我们提问方式下的结果。

quotes.en: The opposite of a correct statement is a false statement. But the opposite of a profound truth may well be another profound truth.
quotes.zh: 一个正确声明的对立面是错误的声明。但一个深刻真理的对立面，很可能是另一个深刻的真理。

quotes.en: The greatest enemy of knowledge is not ignorance, it is the illusion of knowledge.
quotes.zh: 知识最大的敌人不是无知，而是对知识的幻觉。

quotes.en: Look again at that dot. That's here. That's home. That's us.
quotes.zh: 再看看那个光点吧。那是这里，那是家，那是我们。

quotes.en: We can only see a short distance ahead, but we can see plenty there that needs to be done.
quotes.zh: 我们只能看清前方很短的距离，但我们能看到那里有太多需要做的事。

quotes.en: The mind is like an iceberg, it floats with one-seventh of its bulk above water.
quotes.zh: 意识就像冰山，只有七分之一露出水面。

quotes.en: We are not determined by our experiences, but the meaning we give them is self-determining.
quotes.zh: 决定我们的不是过去的经历，而是我们赋予这些经历的意义。

quotes.en: Between stimulus and response there is a space. In that space is our power to choose our response.
quotes.zh: 在刺激与反应之间存在一个空间。在这个空间里，我们拥有选择如何回应的权力。

quotes.en: I suppose it is tempting, if the only tool you have is a hammer, to treat everything as if it were a nail.
quotes.zh: 如果你唯一的工具是一把锤子，你就会把所有的问题都看成钉子。

quotes.en: The curious paradox is that when I accept myself just as I am, then I can change.
quotes.zh: 奇妙的悖论是：只有当我如实地接纳自己时，我才能发生改变。

quotes.en: Education is what survives when what has been learned has been forgotten.
quotes.zh: 教育，就是把学到的所有东西都忘光后剩下的东西。
quotes.authorZh: 伯尔赫斯·弗雷德里克·斯金纳

quotes.en: Everything that irritates us about others can lead us to an understanding of ourselves.
quotes.zh: 每一件让我们对别人感到愤怒的事，都能引导我们去理解自己。

quotes.en: A reliable way to make people believe in falsehoods is frequent repetition, because familiarity is not easily distinguished from truth.
quotes.zh: 让人们相信谎言的可靠方法就是不断重复，因为人们很难将熟悉感与真相区分开来。

quotes.en: The opposite of courage in our society is not cowardice; it is conformity.
quotes.zh: 在我们的社会里，勇气的反面不是懦弱，而是顺从。

quotes.en: Love is an active power in man; a power which breaks through the walls which separate man from his fellow men.
quotes.zh: 爱是人类身上一种主动的力量；一种突破人与人之间隔阂之墙的力量。

quotes.en: Who controls the past controls the future. Who controls the present controls the past.
quotes.zh: 谁控制了过去，谁就控制了未来；谁控制了现在，谁就控制了过去。

quotes.en: People will come to love their oppression, to adore the technologies that undo their capacities to think.
quotes.zh: 人们会渐渐爱上压迫，崇拜那些剥夺他们思考能力的科技。

quotes.en: The sad truth is that most evil is done by people who never make up their minds to be good or evil.
quotes.zh: 可悲的真相是，大多数的邪恶，都是由那些从未主动选择作恶或行善的人造成的。

quotes.en: Man is condemned to be free; because once thrown into the world, he is responsible for everything he does.
quotes.zh: 人被注定要是自由的；因为一旦被抛入这个世界，他就必须对自己的所有行为负责。

quotes.en: The only way to deal with an unfree world is to become so absolutely free that your very existence is an act of rebellion.
quotes.zh: 对付一个不自由世界的唯一办法，就是变得绝对自由，让你的存在本身成为一种反叛。

quotes.en: A theory that explains everything, explains nothing.
quotes.zh: 一个能解释一切的理论，什么也解释不了。

quotes.en: The whole problem with the world is that fools and fanatics are always so certain of themselves, and wiser people so full of doubts.
quotes.zh: 这个世界最大的问题就是：傻瓜和狂热分子总是对自己深信不疑，而智者却充满了疑虑。

quotes.en: Knowledge is not for knowing: knowledge is for cutting.
quotes.zh: 知识不是用来认知的，知识是用来解剖的。

quotes.en: The medium is the message.
quotes.zh: 媒介即讯息。

quotes.en: The question isn't who is going to let me; it's who is going to stop me.
quotes.zh: 问题不在于谁会允许我这么做，而在于谁能阻止我。

quotes.en: The difficulty lies not so much in developing new ideas as in escaping from old ones.
quotes.zh: 困难不在于发展新思想，而在于如何摆脱旧思想的束缚。

quotes.en: In the long run we are all dead.
quotes.zh: 从长远来看，我们都死定了。

quotes.en: The curious task of economics is to demonstrate to men how little they really know about what they imagine they can design.
quotes.zh: 经济学的一项奇妙任务就是向人们证明：对于他们自以为能设计的东西，他们其实知之甚少。

quotes.en: Capitalism... is by nature a form or method of economic change and not only never is but never can be stationary.
quotes.zh: 资本主义……本质上是一种经济变动的形式或方法，它不仅从来不是、也永远不可能是静止的。

quotes.en: Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things.
quotes.zh: 效率是把事情做对，效能是做正确的事。

quotes.en: What gets measured gets managed.
quotes.zh: 能够被衡量的，才能被管理。

quotes.en: In the short run, the market is a voting machine but in the long run, it is a weighing machine.
quotes.zh: 短期来看，市场是一台投票机；但长期来看，它是一台称重机。

quotes.en: Risk comes from not knowing what you're doing.
quotes.zh: 风险来自于你不知道自己在做什么。

quotes.en: All I want to know is where I'm going to die, so I'll never go there.
quotes.zh: 我只想知道我将来会死在哪里，这样我就永远不去那个地方。

quotes.en: A bad system will beat a good person every time.
quotes.zh: 一个糟糕的系统，每一次都会打败一个好人。

quotes.en: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.zh: 成功不是终点，失败也非致命：最重要的是继续前行的勇气。

quotes.en: A pessimist sees the difficulty in every opportunity; an optimist sees the opportunity in every difficulty.
quotes.zh: 悲观主义者在每个机会中看到困难；乐观主义者在每个困难中看到机会。

quotes.en: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
quotes.zh: 我们唯一需要恐惧的，就是恐惧本身。

quotes.en: I never lose. I either win or learn.
quotes.zh: 我从不失败。我要么赢得胜利，要么学到教训。

quotes.en: I have never been overconcerned or obsessed with opinion polls or popularity polls. I think a leader who is, is a weak leader.
quotes.zh: 我从来不过度关心或沉迷于民意调查。我认为一个在乎这些的领导人，是一个软弱的领导人。

quotes.en: The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.
quotes.zh: 道德宇宙的弧线很长，但它终会弯向正义。

quotes.en: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
quotes.zh: 欲变世界，先变其身。

quotes.en: In preparing for battle I have always found that plans are useless, but planning is indispensable.
quotes.zh: 在准备战斗时我总是发现，计划本身是毫无用处的，但做计划的过程却不可或缺。

quotes.en: A rising tide lifts all boats.
quotes.zh: 潮水上涨，百舸齐高。

quotes.en: Learn the rules like a pro, so you can break them like an artist.
quotes.zh: 像专业人士一样学习规则，这样你才能像艺术家一样打破它们。

quotes.en: You can't connect the dots looking forward; you can only connect them looking backwards. So you have to trust that the dots will somehow connect in your future.
quotes.zh: 你无法在展望未来时串联起这些点滴；你只能在回顾过去时将它们联系起来。所以你必须相信，这些点滴会在你的未来以某种方式串联。

quotes.en: Boil things down to the most fundamental truths and say, 'What are we sure is true?'... and then reason up from there.
quotes.zh: 把事物剥离到最基本的真理，然后问：“什么是我们确信为真的？”……再从那里向上推导。

quotes.en: I knew that when I was 80 I was not going to regret having tried this... The only thing I might regret is not ever having tried.
quotes.zh: 我知道在我80岁的时候，我不会因为尝试过这个而后悔……我唯一可能会后悔的，是从来没有去尝试过。

quotes.en: Arm yourself with specific knowledge, accountability, and leverage.
quotes.zh: 用专长、责任感和杠杆武装自己。

quotes.en: Play iterated games. All the returns in life, whether in wealth, relationships, or knowledge, come from compound interest.
quotes.zh: 玩重复博弈的游戏。生活中所有的回报，无论是财富、人际关系还是知识，都来自复利。

quotes.en: What important truth do very few people agree with you on?
quotes.zh: 在什么重要真理上，很少有人同意你的观点？

quotes.en: The maker's schedule is fundamentally different from the manager's schedule. You need long, uninterrupted blocks of time to do great work.
quotes.zh: 创作者的时间表与管理者的时间表有着本质的不同。你需要大块、不受打扰的时间来完成伟大的工作。

quotes.en: Don't be a know-it-all; be a learn-it-all.
quotes.zh: 不要做一个“无所不知”的人；要做一个“无所不学”的人。

quotes.en: I wish upon you ample doses of pain and suffering.
quotes.zh: 我祝愿你们经历足够多的痛苦和磨难。

quotes.en: To be a successful creator you don't need millions. You don't need millions of dollars or millions of customers... To make a living as a craftsperson, photographer, musician, designer, author, or entrepreneur, you need only 1,000 true fans.
quotes.zh: 成为一名成功的创作者，你不需要数以百万计的资金或客户……作为手艺人、摄影师、音乐家、设计师、作家或创业者，你只需要1000个铁杆粉丝就能谋生。

quotes.en: Antifragility is beyond resilience or robustness. The resilient resists shocks and stays the same; the antifragile gets better.
quotes.zh: 反脆弱超越了韧性或强健性。有韧性的事物能抵御冲击并保持原状；而反脆弱的事物却能在冲击中变得更好。
quotes.authorZh: 纳西姆·尼古拉斯·塔勒布

quotes.en: If a book has been in print for forty years, I can expect it to be in print for another forty years.
quotes.zh: 如果一本书已经出版了四十年，我可以预期它还能再出版四十年。
quotes.authorZh: 纳西姆·尼古拉斯·塔勒布

quotes.en: Homo sapiens rules the world because it is the only animal that can believe in things that exist purely in its own imagination, such as gods, states, money, and human rights.
quotes.zh: 智人之所以能统治世界，是因为它是唯一能相信纯粹存在于自身想象中的事物的动物。

quotes.en: Look at the machine from the higher level... You are the designer of your machine, the manager of your machine, and the worker in your machine.
quotes.zh: 从更高层次俯视你的机器……你是机器的设计者、管理者，同时也是机器里的工人。

quotes.en: Doing the right thing is the wrong thing.
quotes.zh: 做正确的事，反而是一件错事。

quotes.en: Human joys and sorrows are not interconnected; I merely find them noisy.
quotes.zh: 人类的悲欢并不相通，我只觉得他们吵闹。

quotes.en: Hope is neither something that exists nor something that doesn't exist. It is like a path across the earth: originally there was no path, but as more people walk upon it, a path is made.
quotes.zh: 希望是本无所谓有，无所谓无的。这正如地上的路；其实地上本没有路，走的人多了，也便成了路。

quotes.en: Just because it has always been so, does that make it right?
quotes.zh: 从来如此，便对么？

quotes.en: A step forward is a step's worth of joy.
quotes.zh: 进一寸有一寸的欢喜。

quotes.en: Half wise and half foolish, half poor and half rich; this is the highest state of human life.
quotes.zh: 半智半愚，半贫半富，乃是人生最高境界。

quotes.en: I only build a small temple, and in this small temple, what I enshrine is 'human nature.'
quotes.zh: 我只建造一座小庙，在这座小庙里，我供奉的是‘人性’。

quotes.en: Those outside the city want to rush in; those inside want to escape.
quotes.zh: 城外的人想冲进去，城里的人想逃出来。

quotes.en: Life is a beautifully ornate gown, crawling with fleas.
quotes.zh: 生命是一袭华美的袍，爬满了蚤子。

quotes.en: To meet the one you are meant to meet amongst millions of people, amidst the boundless wasteland of time over millions of years, neither a step too early nor a step too late, but just in time.
quotes.zh: 于千万人之中遇见你所要遇见的人，于千万年之中，时间的无涯的荒野里，没有早一步，也没有晚一步，刚巧赶上了。

quotes.en: The world is your own; it has absolutely nothing to do with anyone else.
quotes.zh: 世界是自己的，与他人毫无关系。

quotes.en: All human suffering is, in essence, anger at one's own incompetence.
quotes.zh: 人的一切痛苦，本质上都是对自己无能的愤怒。

quotes.en: I live in this world merely to understand some truths and encounter some interesting things. If I can achieve this, my life is a success.
quotes.zh: 我活在世上，无非想要明白些道理，遇见些有趣的事。倘能如我愿，我的一生就算成功。

quotes.en: If the heart has no place to rest, everywhere you go is wandering.
quotes.zh: 心若没有栖息的地方，到哪里都是在流浪。

quotes.en: The dark night gave me black eyes, yet I use them to search for light.
quotes.zh: 黑夜给了我黑色的眼睛，我却用它寻找光明。

quotes.en: Despicability is the passport of the despicable, and nobility is the epitaph of the noble.
quotes.zh: 卑鄙是卑鄙者的通行证，高尚是高尚者的墓志铭。

quotes.en: Death is not something to be rushed; death is a festival that will inevitably arrive.
quotes.zh: 死是一件不必急于求成的事，死是一个必然会降临的节日。

quotes.en: Man lives for the sake of living itself, not for anything outside of living.
quotes.zh: 人是为活着本身而活着的，而不是为活着之外的任何事物所活着。

quotes.en: The most taboo thing in the world is perfection. Look at the moon in the sky; once it is full, it begins to wane. Look at the fruit on the tree; once it is fully ripe, it falls.
quotes.zh: 世界上的事情，最忌讳的就是个十全十美，你看那天上的月亮，一旦圆满了，马上就要亏厌；树上的果子，一旦熟透了，马上就要坠落。

quotes.en: From tomorrow on, I will be a happy man. Feeding horses, chopping wood, traveling the world.
quotes.zh: 从明天起，做一个幸福的人。喂马、劈柴，周游世界。

quotes.en: In the past, daylight faded slowly, and carriages, horses, and mail were all slow. A lifetime was only long enough to love one person.
quotes.zh: 从前的日色变得慢，车，马，邮件都慢，一生只够爱一个人。

quotes.en: The universe is a dark forest. Every civilization is an armed hunter stalking through the trees.
quotes.zh: 宇宙就是一座黑暗森林，每个文明都是带枪的猎人。

quotes.en: Weakness and ignorance are not barriers to survival, but arrogance is.
quotes.zh: 弱小和无知不是生存的障碍，傲慢才是。

quotes.en: I will destroy you, what does it have to do with you?
quotes.zh: 毁灭你，与你何干？

quotes.en: We cannot draw a perfect circle, but that doesn't mean a perfect circle doesn't exist. We must accept our limitations and look up to the infinite.
quotes.zh: 我们画不出一个完美的圆，但这不代表完美的圆不存在。我们要接受自己的有限，去仰望那个无限。

quotes.en: Do not love abstract humanity; love concrete humans.
quotes.zh: 不要爱抽象的人，要爱具体的人。

quotes.en: An important trend in modern society is 'the disappearance of the nearby'. We know everything about grand narratives far away, yet know nothing about our next-door neighbors.
quotes.zh: 现代社会的一个重要趋势就是‘附近的消失’，我们对远方的宏大叙事了如指掌，却对身边的邻居一无所知。

quotes.en: Our social structure is like the ripples generated when a stone is thrown into water... everyone is the center of the concentric circles formed by their social influence.
quotes.zh: 我们的社会结构就像把一块石头丢在水面上所发生的一圈圈推出去的波纹……每个人都是他社会影响所推出去的圈子的中心。

quotes.en: All the meals across the four corners of the world amount to nothing more than a bowl of earthly fireworks (everyday life).
quotes.zh: 四方食事，不过一碗人间烟火。

quotes.en: Common sense is what allows us to maintain a baseline for communication when facing different stances.
quotes.zh: 常识，就是让我们在面对不同立场时，还能保有一点沟通的底线。

quotes.en: In this shallow era, we need a deeper kind of reading to resist the erosion of time.
quotes.zh: 在这个浅薄的时代，我们需要一种更深沉的阅读，来抵抗时间的销蚀。

quotes.en: Gather your heart, focus it on a single point, and you can penetrate anything.
quotes.zh: 把自己的心收回来，放在一个点上，你就能穿透任何东西。

quotes.en: The world may not be worth it, but you are.
quotes.zh: 人间不值得，但你值得。

quotes.en: Even a drop of water has its own dignity and destination.
quotes.zh: 哪怕是一滴水，也有它自己的尊严和归宿。

quotes.en: Beauty is aimless joy.
quotes.zh: 美，是无目的的快乐。

quotes.en: Nostalgia is a tiny postage stamp: I am on this side, and my mother is on the other.
quotes.zh: 乡愁是一枚小小的邮票，我在这头，母亲在那头。

quotes.en: The fate of our times is characterized by rationalization and intellectualization and, above all, by the 'disenchantment of the world'.
quotes.zh: 我们这个时代的宿命，其特征是理性化、理智化，以及最重要的——“世界的祛魅”。

quotes.en: Social facts must be treated as things.
quotes.zh: 必须把社会事实作为客观事物来对待。

quotes.en: The deepest problems of modern life derive from the claim of the individual to preserve the autonomy and individuality of his existence in the face of overwhelming social forces.
quotes.zh: 现代生活最深刻的问题，源于个体在面对压倒性的社会力量时，仍企图保持其存在的自主性和个性。

quotes.en: Choose your self-presentations carefully, for what starts off as a mask may become your face.
quotes.zh: 谨慎选择你的自我呈现，因为一开始的伪装，最终可能会变成你真正的脸。

quotes.en: The function of sociology, as of every science, is to reveal that which is hidden.
quotes.zh: 社会学的作用和所有科学一样，在于揭示那些被隐藏起来的东西。

quotes.en: The old world is dying, and the new world struggles to be born: now is the time of monsters.
quotes.zh: 旧世界正在死去，新世界正挣扎着诞生：如今正是怪物横行的时代。

quotes.en: In a process of enlightenment, there can only be participants.
quotes.zh: 在启蒙的过程中，没有旁观者，只能有参与者。

quotes.en: The scientist is not a person who gives the right answers, he's one who asks the right questions.
quotes.zh: 科学家不是给出正确答案的人，而是提出正确问题的人。

quotes.en: Poverty is hierarchic, smog is democratic.
quotes.zh: 贫穷是等级制的，而雾霾是民主的。

quotes.en: We can better understand the present if we know the history of its making.
quotes.zh: 如果我们了解现在的历史是如何被建构的，我们就能更好地理解现在。

quotes.en: Ideology is not simply a false consciousness, an illusory representation of reality. It is, rather, this reality itself which is already to be conceived as 'ideological'.
quotes.zh: 意识形态并不仅仅是一种虚假意识或对现实的虚幻表述。相反，正是这种现实本身，已经被建构成了一种“意识形态”。

quotes.en: We feel free because we lack the very language to articulate our unfreedom.
quotes.zh: 我们之所以感到自由，是因为我们缺乏表达自身不自由的语言。

quotes.en: The simulacrum is never that which conceals the truth—it is the truth which conceals that there is none. The simulacrum is true.
quotes.zh: 拟像从不掩盖真相——而是真相在掩盖“根本没有真相”的事实。拟像即是真实。

quotes.en: Uncertainty is the natural habitat of human life.
quotes.zh: 不确定性，是人类生活的自然栖息地。

quotes.en: Amusement under late capitalism is the prolongation of work.
quotes.zh: 在晚期资本主义时代，娱乐不过是劳动的延伸。

quotes.en: There is no document of civilization which is not at the same time a document of barbarism.
quotes.zh: 没有任何一份文明的记录，不同时也是一份野蛮的记录。

quotes.en: Man's desire is the desire of the Other.
quotes.zh: 人的欲望，其实就是他者的欲望。

quotes.en: In societies where modern conditions of production prevail, all of life presents itself as an immense accumulation of spectacles.
quotes.zh: 在现代生产条件占统治地位的社会中，整个生活表现为庞大景观的堆积。

quotes.en: The birth of the reader must be at the cost of the death of the Author.
quotes.zh: 读者的诞生，必须以作者的死亡为代价。

quotes.en: Culture is one of the principal means by which the 'consent' of the masses is secured.
quotes.zh: 文化，是获取大众“同意”与顺从的主要手段之一。

quotes.en: Every block of stone has a statue inside it and it is the task of the sculptor to discover it.
quotes.zh: 每一块石头里都藏着一尊雕像，雕塑家的任务就是去发现它。

quotes.en: Normality is a paved road: It's comfortable to walk, but no flowers grow on it.
quotes.zh: 正常不过是一条铺好的路：走起来很舒服，但上面长不出花来。

quotes.en: Practice what you know, and it will help to make clear what now you do not know.
quotes.zh: 去实践你所知道的，它会帮你理清你目前还不知道的。

quotes.en: The sleep of reason produces monsters.
quotes.zh: 理性的沉睡孕育了怪物。

quotes.en: It's on the strength of observation and reflection that one finds a way.
quotes.zh: 正是凭借观察和反思的力量，一个人才能找到出路。

quotes.en: Nothing is a waste of time if you use the experience wisely.
quotes.zh: 只要你明智地利用经验，任何事情都不是浪费时间。

quotes.en: To play a wrong note is insignificant; to play without passion is inexcusable.
quotes.zh: 弹错一个音符无关紧要，但没有激情地演奏是不可原谅的。

quotes.en: The music is not in the notes, but in the silence between.
quotes.zh: 音乐不在音符中，而在于音符之间的空白。
quotes.authorZh: 沃尔夫冈·阿玛迪乌斯·莫扎特

quotes.en: A time is coming when a carrot, freshly observed, will trigger a revolution.
quotes.zh: 时代终将到来，一根被全新观察的胡萝卜，也能引发一场革命。

quotes.en: Without craftsmanship, inspiration is a mere reed shaken in the wind.
quotes.zh: 没有技艺的支撑，灵感只不过是风中摇曳的芦苇。

quotes.en: The creative act is not performed by the artist alone; the spectator brings the work in contact with the external world.
quotes.zh: 创造性行为并非由艺术家单方面完成，是观看者将作品与外部世界联系了起来。

quotes.en: Have no fear of perfection - you'll never reach it.
quotes.zh: 不要害怕完美——因为你永远无法达到。

quotes.en: Everything we see hides another thing, we always want to see what is hidden by what we see.
quotes.zh: 我们看到的每一件事物都隐藏着另一件事物，而我们总是想看透眼前所见，去寻找那被隐藏的东西。

quotes.en: Making money is art and working is art and good business is the best art.
quotes.zh: 赚钱是艺术，工作是艺术，而好生意是最棒的艺术。

quotes.en: A painting is not a picture of an experience, but is the experience.
quotes.zh: 一幅画并不是对某段体验的描绘，它本身就是体验。

quotes.en: I paint self-portraits because I am so often alone, because I am the person I know best.
quotes.zh: 我画自画像是因为我经常感到孤独，因为我是我最了解的人。

quotes.en: Color is a power which directly influences the soul.
quotes.zh: 色彩是一种能够直接触及灵魂的力量。

quotes.en: Every good painter paints what he is.
quotes.zh: 每一个优秀的画家，画的都是他自己。

quotes.en: The function of the artist in a disturbed society is to give awareness of the universe.
quotes.zh: 在一个动荡的社会中，艺术家的职责是赋予人们对宇宙的感知力。

quotes.en: There are 360 degrees, so why stick to one?
quotes.zh: 宇宙有360个角度，为什么非要死守一个呢？

quotes.en: A book read by a thousand different people is a thousand different books.
quotes.zh: 一本书被一千个不同的人阅读，那就是一千本不同的书。

quotes.en: There is no terror in the bang, only in the anticipation of it.
quotes.zh: 爆炸本身并不可怕，真正的恐惧在于对爆炸的等待。

quotes.en: Life is a tragedy when seen in close-up, but a comedy in long-shot.
quotes.zh: 人生近看是悲剧，远看是喜剧。

quotes.en: The most terrifying fact about the universe is not that it is hostile but that it is indifferent.
quotes.zh: 关于宇宙最可怕的事实，不是它对我们充满敌意，而是它对我们漠不关心。

quotes.en: No form of art goes beyond ordinary consciousness as film does, straight to our emotions, deep into the twilight room of the soul.
quotes.zh: 没有任何一种艺术能像电影那样超越寻常的意识，直击我们的情感，深入灵魂的幽暗之室。

quotes.en: Man is a genius when he is dreaming.
quotes.zh: 人在做梦的时候，都是天才。

quotes.en: A story should have a beginning, a middle and an end, but not necessarily in that order.
quotes.zh: 故事应该有开头、中间和结尾，但未必一定要按照这个顺序。

quotes.en: All art is autobiographical; the pearl is the oyster's autobiography.
quotes.zh: 所有的艺术都是自传；珍珠就是牡蛎的自传。

quotes.en: Love the art in yourself, not yourself in the art.
quotes.zh: 爱你心中的艺术，而不是艺术中的自己。
quotes.authorZh: 康斯坦丁·斯坦尼斯拉夫斯基

quotes.en: The enemy of art is the absence of limitations.
quotes.zh: 艺术的死敌，是没有限制。

quotes.en: Imperfection is beauty, madness is genius and it's better to be absolutely ridiculous than absolutely boring.
quotes.zh: 不完美是种美丽，疯狂是种天才，宁愿极其荒谬，也绝不要极其无聊。

quotes.en: The only thing an actor owes his public is not to bore them.
quotes.zh: 一个演员欠公众的唯一一件事，就是不要让他们感到无聊。

quotes.en: I'm starting with the man in the mirror. I'm asking him to change his ways.
quotes.zh: 我要从镜中之人开始，我要求他改变自己的方式。

quotes.en: I am my own experiment. I am my own work of art.
quotes.zh: 我是我自己的实验品，我是我自己的艺术品。

quotes.en: If you can do what you do best and be happy, you're further along in life than most people.
quotes.zh: 如果你能做你最擅长的事并且感到快乐，你在人生的道路上就已经领先于大多数人了。

quotes.en: The great gift of human beings is that we have the power of empathy.
quotes.zh: 人类最伟大的天赋，就是我们拥有共情的能力。

quotes.en: There are two ways you can get through pain. You can let it destroy you, or you can use it as fuel to drive you.
quotes.zh: 熬过痛苦有两种方式：你可以让它毁灭你，或者你可以把它当作驱动你的燃料。

quotes.en: I don't like to gamble, but if there's one thing I'm willing to bet on, it's myself.
quotes.zh: 我不喜欢赌博，但如果有一件事我愿意下注，那就是我自己。

quotes.en: Fall forward. Every failed experiment is one step closer to success.
quotes.zh: 向前跌倒。每一次失败的实验，都是向成功迈进的一步。

quotes.en: You have to be unique, and different, and shine in your own way.
quotes.zh: 你必须独一无二，与众不同，并以你自己的方式闪耀。

quotes.en: Nothing is impossible, the word itself says 'I'm possible'!
quotes.zh: 没有什么是不可能的，这个词本身就在说“我是可能的”！

quotes.en: I don't know where I'm going from here, but I promise it won't be boring.
quotes.zh: 我不知道接下来我要去哪里，但我保证那绝对不会无聊。

quotes.en: Life is what happens to you while you're busy making other plans.
quotes.zh: 生活，就是当你忙着制定其他计划时，发生在你身上的事情。

quotes.en: Non, je ne regrette rien.
quotes.zh: 不，我绝不后悔。

quotes.en: My philosophy is: It's none of my business what people say of me and think of me. I am what I am and I do what I do.
quotes.zh: 我的哲学是：别人怎么说我、怎么看我，都不关我的事。我就是我，我做我想做的。

quotes.en: I make music for ears, not eyes.
quotes.zh: 我做音乐是给耳朵听的，不是给眼睛看的。

quotes.en: Sex appeal is fifty percent what you've got and fifty percent what people think you've got.
quotes.zh: 性感有50%来源于你真正拥有的，另外50%来源于别人认为你拥有的。

quotes.en: The great thing about rock and roll is that someone like me can be a star.
quotes.zh: 摇滚乐最棒的地方就在于，像我这样的人也能成为明星。

quotes.en: The less people know about me, the better I can do my job.
quotes.zh: 人们对我的私生活了解得越少，我就越能把演员这份工作做好。

quotes.en: I like to be loved like I love myself.
quotes.zh: 我希望别人爱我，就像我爱我自己那样。

quotes.en: You never know how strong you are, until being strong is your only choice.
quotes.zh: 你永远不知道自己有多强大，直到“变得强大”成为你唯一的选择。

quotes.en: In this life, to earn your place you have to fight for it.
quotes.zh: 在这辈子，要赢得你的位置，你必须为之战斗。

quotes.en: What is important is to believe in something so strongly that you're never discouraged.
quotes.zh: 重要的是要极其强烈地相信某件事，以至于你永远不会感到气馁。

quotes.en: There is beauty and humility in imperfection.
quotes.zh: 在不完美中，存在着美与谦卑。

quotes.en: You just have to keep doing it, because you never know when it's going to happen.
quotes.zh: 你只需要一直做下去，因为你永远不知道那个机会什么时候会降临。

quotes.en: La vida es un carnaval y es más bello vivir cantando.
quotes.zh: 生活就是一场嘉年华，在歌唱中度过会更加美好。

quotes.en: Talent is something you bloom, not something you hide.
quotes.zh: 天赋是用来绽放的，而不是用来隐藏的。

quotes.en: My life is a constant evolution.
quotes.zh: 我的生命就是一场持续不断的进化。

quotes.en: I'm fearless, I don't complain. Even when horrible things happen to me, I go on.
quotes.zh: 我无所畏惧，从不抱怨。即使可怕的事情发生在我身上，我也会继续前行。

quotes.en: If tomorrow I want to release a rock album or a bachata album, nobody can tell me anything - why? Because I'm me.
quotes.zh: 如果明天我想发一张摇滚专辑或巴恰塔专辑，没人能指手画脚——为什么？因为我就是我。

quotes.en: Be water, my friend. Formless, shapeless, like water.
quotes.zh: 像水一样吧，我的朋友。无形无相，如水一般。

quotes.en: Do not let circumstances control you. You change your circumstances.
quotes.zh: 不要让环境控制你，你要去改变环境。

quotes.en: Yet, even amidst the hatred and carnage, life is still worth living.
quotes.zh: 然而，即使在仇恨和杀戮之中，生活依然值得一过。

quotes.en: There is no such thing as normal. Normal is just another word for lifeless.
quotes.zh: 世界上根本没有“正常”这回事。正常，只是毫无生气的代名词。

quotes.en: No matter who you are, where you're from, your skin color, gender identity: speak yourself.
quotes.zh: 无论你是谁，你来自哪里，你的肤色，你的性别认同：请为你自己发声。

quotes.en: As long as you are doing what you love, there is no such thing as 'too late'.
quotes.zh: 只要你在做你热爱的事情，就永远没有“太晚”这一说。

quotes.en: Acting is a way for me to express myself without being me.
quotes.zh: 表演对我来说，是一种无需暴露真实自我就能表达自我的方式。

quotes.en: Elegance is innate... individuality will always stand out.
quotes.zh: 优雅是与生俱来的……而个性永远会脱颖而出。

quotes.en: Even though I am old, I don't want to be boring. I would rather die than live a boring life.
quotes.zh: 虽然我老了，但我可不想变成一个无聊的老头。无聊的人生，我死也不要。

quotes.en: Bad luck is a good thing, because it teaches you what good luck is.
quotes.zh: 坏运气是件好事，因为它教会了你什么是好运气。

quotes.en: Language brings with it an identity and a culture, or at least the perception of it.
quotes.zh: 语言带来的是一种认同感和文化，或者至少是人们对它的感知。

quotes.en: I look at a stream and I see myself: a native South African, flowing onward, surviving.
quotes.zh: 我看着一条小溪，仿佛看到了自己：一个土生土长的南非人，奔流向前，生生不息。

quotes.en: I don't believe in playing the victim. I believe in taking responsibility for my own actions.
quotes.zh: 我不相信扮演受害者。我相信要为自己的行为承担责任。

quotes.en: If you know you are going to fail, then fail gloriously.
quotes.zh: 如果你知道自己注定要失败，那就败得轰轰烈烈。

quotes.en: Now I am actually realizing that you don't need to be perfect. You just need to be yourself.
quotes.zh: 现在我才真正意识到，你不需要做到完美。你只需要做你自己。

quotes.en: No matter where you are from, your dreams are valid.
quotes.zh: 无论你来自哪里，你的梦想都是合理且有效的。

quotes.en: You are only as good as your last performance.
quotes.zh: 你到底有多优秀，取决于你最后一次的表现。

quotes.en: I believe in taking a leap of faith. I'm not afraid to fall.
quotes.zh: 我相信信仰之跃。我不害怕坠落。

quotes.en: I like the villain. The villain is always more interesting than the hero.
quotes.zh: 我喜欢反派。反派总是比英雄更有趣。

quotes.en: I think it's important to keep laughing... laughter is the best way to get through anything.
quotes.zh: 我认为保持欢笑很重要……笑是熬过任何困境最好的方式。
